title: Latency, Concurrency, Rate and Spend Limits, Context Cache, and Load · Behavior Case: Context Cache Policy
summary: The agent parallelizes every request, queues without limit, retries 429s immediately, caches sensitive context indefinitely, and estimates capacity from one local happy path. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the context cache policy increment in budgeted agent capacity and overload controller. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Use implicit or explicit context caching only with correct prefix identity, tenant isolation, expiry, invalidation, retention, privacy, and measured reuse value.
Enforce project and tenant requests, tokens, daily and rolling spend, retry, model, and tool budgets before work starts and while it runs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-context-cache-policy — Use implicit or explicit context caching only with correct prefix identity, tenant isolation, expiry, invalidation, retention, privacy, and measured reuse value.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-performance-concurrency-cache-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-performance-concurrency-cache-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_performance_concurrency_cache_5(requests: int = 120, completed_requests: int = 114, rejected_overload: int = 6, cache_hits: int = 32, budget_breaches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if requests < 20 or completed_requests < 0 or rejected_overload < 0:
        return False, requests, "load-count"
    if completed_requests + rejected_overload != requests:
        return False, completed_requests, "load-reconciliation"
    if cache_hits < 0 or cache_hits > completed_requests:
        return False, cache_hits, "cache-accounting"
    if budget_breaches > 0:
        return False, budget_breaches, "resource-budget-breach"
    assert completed_requests + rejected_overload == requests and budget_breaches == 0
    return True, completed_requests, "bounded-agent-capacity"

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Context Cache Policy, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Context Cache Policy record says budgeted agent capacity and overload controller looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect context cache policy evidence boundary for Context Cache Policy.

For inspect context cache policy evidence, run one convenient fluent model response, omit stakeholder risk, revision, model and API identity, interaction and call correlation, tool schema and authority, state and resource budgets, approval, changed fixtures, injection, privacy, accessibility, evaluation, recovery, and controlled provider transfer, then accept plausible text as agent proof. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use implicit or explicit context caching only with correct prefix identity, tenant isolation, expiry, invalidation, retention, privacy, and measured reuse value.
